message:
fix(engine): deduplicate promise counters, verify empty replay traces, and extend CLI output

Promise model (promise_model.rs):
- Fix duplicate counting in Promise.all/allSettled/any trackers by
  checking if index already exists before incrementing settle counters
- Prevents over-counting when the same index is recorded twice

Causal replay (causal_replay.rs):
- Add nondeterminism hash verification even for empty traces — validate
  content_hash() matches recorded nondeterminism_hash before processing
- Return ChainIntegrity error on mismatch instead of silently proceeding

Hook effect contract (hook_effect_contract.rs):
- Add dependency presence consistency check: reject when deps are present
  in one render but absent in another (React rules-of-hooks violation)

React lane inference (react_lane_inference.rs):
- Replace multiplication chain with saturating_mul() to prevent overflow
  in lane priority calculations

Ambient authority (ambient_authority.rs):
- Filter inline comments before pattern matching to prevent false
  positives on patterns appearing after // in code lines

CLI frankenctl (bin/frankenctl.rs):
- Add --output flag to CompileArtifact verify and Receipt verify commands
  for scriptable file output workflows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
